title: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: The JOJOLands
titleRomaji: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: The JOJOLands
titleNative: ジョジョの奇妙な冒険 The JOJOLands
synopsis: The stage is set on a volcanic island in the Pacific Ocean, Hawaii. Jodio Joestar, a young boy living on Oahu Island, harbors the ambition to become a great millionaire. The clue to his goal lies in reaching the pinnacle of the mechanisms of this world. What means will he choose to achieve his objective?
searchTerms: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: The JOJOLands
ジョジョの奇妙な冒険 The JOJOLands
synonyms: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 9: The JOJOLands

title: Countach
titleNative: カウンタック
synopsis: The day after he finds himself dumped by his girlfriend, Sorayama Shun recieves a letter... from himself? The letter was from Shun 25 years ago for his future self. The letter reminds him of the time when he dreamed of owning a Countach and being a successful professional racer. With loads of luck and his ambition to make his childhood dream come true, he finds himself as a new owner of an LP400 Countach.

title: Dara-san of Reiwa
titleNative: 令和のダラさん
synopsis: Clouds blacken the sky and sheets of rain turn the mountain forest into a treacherous maze... A landslide crushes a razor wire fence, and buries a "NO TRESPASSING" sign... Two young siblings wander into a dark world where they do not belong, and a long, horrid shadow rears up to meet them- Anyway, so that's how we met Dara-san! She might look kinda scary, but just wait until you get to know her! "Look, I'm a god of misfortune, okay!? Aren't you kids gonna freak out about my grotesque visage!?" (Source: Yen Press)

title: Over Rev!
titleNative: オーバーレブ!
synonyms: A Legend of Ultimate Hot Rodder
synopsis: Ryoko's life used to revolve around track but due to an injury she can no longer follow the path she hoped to. One day while out with her friends, she witnesses two cars racing and gets caught up in the excitement, especially after realizing the one driver is a young woman like herself! When a chance arrives for her to try drifting, she dives right in, even though she's never driven a car before. Suddenly, she has a new passion... and a lot to learn. (Source: Shogakukan, translated)

title: How to Love a Loser
titleNative: ダメ人間の愛しかた
synopsis: Shinba has no talent, no job, no money...he's a complete loser. However, he has a girlfriend, Hizumi who is beautiful, smart, good at her work. He has no idea why she says she likes him. He's almost scared, but loves Hizumi so much...he asks Hizumi, "Why do you want to date with someone like me?" She answers..."You always oversleep, talk about some video games I don't even know about, sing lame songs no one knows at karaoke, gave me a toy ring as a gift. Your face is always gloomy as hell. But...looking at such face makes me happy, Shinba. I love you, ha ha." Is she telling the truth? Hizumi must have some kind of a secret, Shinba thinks. He wants to find out...but maybe he shouldn't. (Source: BookWalker)
synonyms: How To Love A Misfit
How to Love a Useless Person

title: Yuusha no Ore-sama ga Madoushi Nanka ni!
titleRomaji: Yuusha no Ore-sama ga Madoushi Nanka ni!
titleNative: 勇者の俺様が魔導士なんかに！
synopsis: Leo, a mage, is expelled from the heroic party by Kane, the brave, because he just can't get on with. However, after Leo leaves, the party continues to lose. Kane asks Leo to return to the party, but Leo fed up with Kane's unmannerly attitude, asks Kane to get down on his knees... Kane's pride is shattered, and when Kane shows tears for the first time, Leo feels a certain excitement...? (Source: Libre, translated) Notes: - Chapter 13 was split into two parts in the original serialization and later combined in the volume release. “Stretch (ストレッチ)” published in Pixiv Comic was not included in any of the volumes. - Includes six extra chapters.

title: Kono Sekai de Ore dake ga (Level Up) wo Shitteiru
titleRomaji: Kono Sekai de Ore dake ga (Level Up) wo Shitteiru
titleNative: この世界で俺だけが【レベルアップ】を知っている
synonyms: Only I Know About "Leveling Up" in This World
Thế Giới Chỉ Mình Tôi Level Up
synopsis: A world where the worth of one's life is decided by one's Level. Theo, an S-Rank adventurer, had reincarnated thousand years later in a future where the people had forgotten about the power called "Level Up." In this world where a person would be Level 1 at birth, humanity is persecuted as the weakest race and the people lived everyday while fearing the danger of monsters. However, in their midst only Theo, who was chosen to be a sacrifice for the monsters, knew that humans can become the strongest because only they have the ability to Level Up.

title: Tianwai Fei Lai Bushi Xian
titleNative: 天外飞来不是仙
synonyms: Celestials in the Cosmos
synopsis: The immortal cultivator Yi Genqing (the male protagonist) failed to ascend and mistakenly entered the interstellar world. He, the female protagonist Alex, and the captain of the guard Lei were swallowed by a huge and vague mysterious alien. The three woke up in a place similar to a prison and found that many strange people were imprisoned there. In order to escape, they teamed up with the perverted robot, the crazy and thrill-seeking Irlin with telekinetic ability, and the autistic but defensive Tolby. In the contradictions and conflicts, they began to be unreliable. (Source: Tencent, translated)

title: Zatsutabi
titleNative: ざつ旅-That's Journey-
synopsis: Chika, who just started her career as a manga artist, was trying to find a right story for her first manga but her editor was rejecting all of her stories. Exhausted, Chika suddenly came up with an idea to travel somewhere. Somewhere, not here. She asked her social media followers which direction she should go. When the direction was decided, she sets out for her trip--a trip without any plans. First, she travels north--despite not knowing what awaits her, she manages to eat and see amazing things which she never expected. She stays in a fantastic place, enjoys everything. Sometimes, her friends join her trip...which she enjoys also. This is the ultimate travel manga for everyone who needs some time to forget everything. (Source: Kadokawa Global) Note: Nominated for the Tsugimanga 2020 Award in the Manga Category.

To update their maps, she and her partner Kago ride a motorcycle to survey an area where the roads are haunted by monsters and evil spirits. When Noa takes a rest to bathe in a spring, what appears in front of her...? (Source: Young King Ours GH, translated)

titleNative: ぼっち・ざ・ろっく！
synopsis: Hitori Gotoh just wants to be popular, but the thought of interacting with her classmates makes her fall to pieces. Her solution-become a rock legend so cool that people approach her instead! However, while spending all of middle school in her closet shredding

title: Class de Ichiban Kawaii Gal wo Ezuke Shiteiru Hanashi
titleRomaji: Class de Ichiban Kawaii Gal wo Ezuke Shiteiru Hanashi
titleNative: クラスで一番かわいいギャルを餌付けしている話
synopsis: Sakura Kouzuki, a top-tier gyaru who's the star of the class and even works as a reader model, and Houri Kazami, who prefers talking otaku stuff with his comrades in the corner of the classroom. These two, who seem to live in completely different worlds, are actually step-siblings—and secretly live together as a couple. And none of their classmates know the truth. While Sakura sparkles at school, once she's home she relaxes completely and falls head over heels for Ori's cooking. And Houri, who’s in charge of meals, doesn’t mind one bit—— “Simmered fish is sooo good~♡” “Onii-chan's cooking really is the best~!” A sweet and fluffy feeding story about a cute gyaru and their double life at school and at home! (Source: Square Enix, translated)

title: Replica: Revenge of the Ex-Wife
titleNative: レプリカ 元妻の復讐
synopsis: Aoi grew up constantly being made fun of and bullied for her appearance. After going through one bad experience after the other in school, she finally gets to marry the man of her dreams who loves her for who she is. However, he too eventually seeks out someone better-looking and cheats on her, resulting in their divorce. Oddly enough though... the woman he cheated on Aoi with is the same girl who bullied her throughout their school years...! Now Aoi's on a mission to get revenge on the man who cheated on her who is now married to the woman who made her life miserable. She has her face reshaped, her name changed to Sumire, and slowly begins to find her way into their lives... (Source: MangaPlaza)

synopsis: Iori, a hunter who is sent to another world after saving the wolf cub. In the forest where he arrives, he meets a pair of cute beastman twins and decides to live together. But these twins are super strong!? The wolf cub that was sent with him is also a "divine beast"!? A fun and fulfilling life in another world begins with Iori, who is kind-hearted but tends to get out of control when it comes to cooking, and the "important things" he has found! (Source: Alphapolis, translated)

synonyms: ソウルキャッチャーズ
synopsis: Shota Kamine is a boy who could "see? other people's hearts. With this power, he tries to use it for the good of people, but nothing ever goes right. Not being able to sought out the meaning behind the power of his eyes, he becomes discouraged and loses all hope. While then, on the school rooftop he meets a boy, Hibiki Tokisaka, and gets his own heart grasped by the sound of his saxophone!! Kamine who became interested with Hibiki, goes and visits the brass band's concert. There, Kamine witnesses Hibiki's performance shaking up and gripping the people's hearts. Hibiki, who had overcome what Kamine thought could never happen and not possible for him to even do, Kamine approaches him to talk about it, but to find out Hibiki too carry a dark past he cannot tell others. title: Tetsunabe no Jan! R: Choujou Sakusen
titleRomaji: Tetsunabe no Jan! R: Choujou Sakusen
titleNative: 鉄鍋のジャン!R 頂上作戦
synopsis: This year in major international competition of Chinese cuisine, the presumed winners are assured of victory. Indeed, a major sponsor is behind them. These are the ultra-powerful and ultra-wealthy 13 dragons, mostly linked to the Mafia. About this competition which is of prime importance, they control the judges, and put pressure on some competitors worrisome. However it was not counting on the arrival of a cook who fears no pressure. Known in the culinary world for his pranks and his eccentricity, he was once involved in the murder by poisoning. After disappearing for years in China, where nobody knew what he was doing, Jan is back!
